title: echinolaena loliacea
intro: Echinolaena loliacea is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as pain relief and immune system support. Echinolaena loliacea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
